# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: Creates a VPC with public and private subnets for a three-tier application, along with basic routing and an internet gateway.

Resources:
  MyVpc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      InstanceTenancy: default
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVpc

  MyInternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyInternetGateway

  VpcRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    DependsOn: [MyVpc]
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      Routes:
        - DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
          GatewayId: !GetAtt MyInternetGateway.InternetGatewayId

  PublicSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DependsOn: [MyVpc]
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      AvailabilityZone: ap-southeast-1a
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PublicSubnet

  PrivateSubnet:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    DependsOn: [MyVpc]
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      AvailabilityZone: ap-southeast-1a
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      MapPublicIpOnLaunch: false
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: PrivateSubnet

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: The ID of the newly created VPC
    Value: !Ref MyVpc
  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: The ID of the internet gateway created for the VPC
    Value: !GetAtt MyInternetGateway.InternetGatewayId
  RouteTableId:
    Description: The ID of the route table created for the VPC
    Value: !Ref VpcRouteTable
  PublicSubnetId:
    Description: The ID of the public subnet created in the VPC
    Value: !Ref PublicSubnet
  PrivateSubnetId:
    Description: The ID of the private subnet created in the VPC
    Value: !Ref PrivateSubnet
